    final Pair<Coordinate,Coordinate>
    SearchAgent.makeFirstMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    A method to calculate the first move of the game which contains two decisions: the @{link Coordinate} of the "inner" game to select and then the Coordinate of the square on that "inner" game to mark.
    final Pair<Coordinate,Coordinate>
    SearchAgent.makeFirstMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    A method to calculate the first move of the game which contains two decisions: the @{link Coordinate} of the "inner" game to select and then the Coordinate of the square on that "inner" game to mark.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<Coordinate,Set<Coordinate>>
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView.getAvailableFirstMoves()
    A method to get all available moves that can be made on the first turn of the game.
    Map<Coordinate,Set<Coordinate>>
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView.getAvailableFirstMoves()
    A method to get all available moves that can be made on the first turn of the game.
    Set<Coordinate>
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView.getAvailableMoves()
    A method to get all available Coordinates that the current player could choose on the current "inner" game.
    Set<Coordinate>
    TicTacToeGame.TicTacToeGameView.getAvailableMoves()
    A method to get all available Coordinates that the current player could choose on this game.

    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView.applyFirstMove(Coordinate gameCoord, Coordinate moveCoord)
    A method to apply the provided move (e.g. the Coordinate the current player wants to mark) on the "inner" game located at the other provided Coordinate.
